name: claude-team-usage
description: See your share of a shared Claude Max plan's 5-hour and 7-day limits.

claudeUsage.supabaseUrl.description: Supabase project URL to sync usage snapshots to. Defaults to the shared team project — leave empty to disable sync entirely (local features keep working without it).

claudeUsage.supabaseAnonKey.description: Supabase anon/publishable key used to sync usage snapshots. This is a publishable key (insert-only, aggregates-only RPC) — safe to ship as a default. Leave empty to disable sync entirely.

claudeUsage.userNameOverride.description: Optional label to identify you in shared usage data, instead of your git identity or a generated device id.
